summary: The documentation build failed because `transformers/modeling_utils.py` contains an unresolved git merge conflict marker (`<<<<<<< sonic-moe`), which causes a Python SyntaxError when the doc builder tries to import the module. The error surfaced while building the MDX documentation for `docs/source/en/model_doc/llama.md`.
root_cause: A git merge conflict marker left in `modeling_utils.py` at line 1974 (`<<<<<<< sonic-moe`) makes the file unparseable Python, causing a SyntaxError when the doc builder imports the `transformers` package.

evidence.quote:
File "/home/runner/work/transformers/transformers/.venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/transformers/modeling_utils.py", line 1974
    <<<<<<< sonic-moe
    ^^
SyntaxError: invalid syntax
evidence.reason: Directly shows an unresolved git merge conflict marker in modeling_utils.py that causes a Python SyntaxError at parse time.

evidence.quote:
SyntaxError: There was an error when converting ../transformers/docs/source/en/model_doc/llama.md to the MDX format.
invalid syntax
evidence.reason: Confirms the SyntaxError propagated up through the doc builder and caused the build job to fail on the llama.md documentation page.
Confirms the overall CI job exited with a failure status as a result of the SyntaxError.

suggested_fix: Resolve the git merge conflict in `transformers/modeling_utils.py` around line 1974 by removing the conflict markers (`<<<<<<< sonic-moe`, `=======`, `>>>>>>>`) and keeping the correct code, then commit the resolved file.

model_info._backfill_note: Pre-Codex-2026-05-14 F2 fix. The Claude shim now persists _model_info from every API call; this row predates that emit so resolved_model and usage are not recoverable. requested_model is set to the shim-level alias (haiku for v1, sonnet for v2) which is what the post-fix shim emits.
